info.title: Debate-Agent
info.description:
Danwa — Auditierbarer Multi-Agenten-Debatten-Workflow.

KI-gestützte Debattenplattform mit Multi-Tenant-Authentifizierung, RAG-Dokumentenanalyse, paralleler Workflow-Ausführung und strukturierter Berichterstellung.

**Authentifizierung:** JWT Bearer Token via `/api/v1/auth/login`.

**Dokumentation:** [Swagger UI](/docs) · [ReDoc](/redoc) · [OpenAPI JSON](/openapi.json)

get.description: Endpoint that serves Prometheus metrics.

post.description: Register a new user (self-signup). First user is auto-promoted to admin.
Authenticate with email + password. Returns JWT token pair.
Exchange a refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair.

get.description: Get the current authenticated user's profile.

put.description:
Update the current user's profile (display_name).

S-03 fix: uses a typed Pydantic model instead of raw dict for
input validation (min_length=1, max_length=200 on display_name).

get.description: Return the case id the current user last opened, or null.

put.description:
Persist (or clear) the case id the user last opened.

Body: ``{"case_id": "..."}`` to set, or ``{"case_id": null}`` to clear.
Returns 204 on success.

get.description: List all registered users (admin only).

schema.title: Response List Users Api V1 Auth Users Get

post.description: Invite a new user by creating their account with a password (admin only).

delete.description: Delete a user account (admin only). Cannot delete yourself.

get.description: List all tenants the current user belongs to.

schema.title: Response List My Tenants Api V1 Auth My Tenants Get

post.description:
Switch the current user's active tenant.

Validates membership and returns a new JWT token pair with the
selected tenant_id embedded. The new token should be used for
subsequent API requests.

get.description: List all BYOK keys for the current user (keys are masked).

schema.title: Response List User Keys Api V1 User Keys Get

put.description:
Store or update a BYOK API key for a specific LLM profile.

The key is stored per-user and takes precedence over the profile's
environment variable when the user triggers an LLM call.

delete.description: Delete all BYOK API keys for the current user.
Delete a BYOK API key for a specific LLM profile.

get.description: List all tenants. Admin only.

schema.title: Response List All Tenants Api V1 Tenants  Get

post.description: Create a new tenant. Admin only. Creator gets owner membership.

get.description: Get the current user's tenant.

put.description: Update the current tenant's settings. Admin only.

get.description: List all users in the current tenant. Admin only.

schema.title: Response List Tenant Users Api V1 Tenants Current Users Get

post.description: Invite a new user to the current tenant. Admin only.

delete.description: Remove a user from the current tenant. Admin only. Cannot remove yourself.

get.description: List all cases in a tenant.

schema.title: Response List Cases Api V1 Tenants  Tenant Id  Cases Get

post.description: Create a new case within a tenant.

get.description: Get case details.

patch.description: Update case fields (title, description, tags, status).

delete.description: Delete a case. System default cases cannot be deleted.

schema.title: Response Delete Case Api V1 Tenants  Tenant Id  Cases  Case Id  Delete

get.description: List all tags for a tenant.

schema.title: Response List Tags Api V1 Tenants  Tenant Id  Tags Get

post.description: Create a new tag for a tenant.

get.description: Get a single tag.

put.description: Update a tag's name and/or color.

delete.description: Delete a tag.

schema.title: Response Delete Tag Api V1 Tenants  Tenant Id  Tags  Tag Id  Delete

get.description:
List projects scoped to the current user's tenant.

.. deprecated::
    Use ``GET /api/v1/tenants/{tid}/cases`` instead.

schema.title: Response List Projects Api V1 Projects Get

get.description:
List all debates (newest first) — for history panel.

Query params:
    status: Filter by debate status (pending, running, completed, failed).
    search: Full-text search in case_preview (case-insensitive).

schema.title: Response List Debates Api V1 Debate Get

post.description: Create a new debate (status = pending).

get.description:
Find the first running debate across ALL projects.

Used by the Dashboard to detect externally-started debates (e.g. via A2A)
that may live in a different project than the active one.

schema.title: Response Find Running Debate Across Projects Api V1 Debate Cross Project Running Get

delete.description: Delete a debate and its associated audit events.

schema.title: Response Delete Debate Api V1 Debate  Debate Id  Delete

patch.description:
Move a debate to a different project.

Source project is determined by the X-Project-Id header.
Target project is specified in the request body.

schema.title: Response Move Debate Api V1 Debate  Debate Id  Patch

get.description: Get debate status and progress.

post.description:
Start a pending debate — launches the workflow in a background task.

Returns immediately with status=running.  Real-time progress is
delivered via the SSE stream endpoint.

Start a debate directly from a canvas layout.

Converts the layout to a WorkflowDefinition, creates a debate with
bundle-resolved agent profiles, and launches the workflow.

Cancel a running debate.

Sets a cancellation flag that the workflow checks between rounds.
Idempotent: if the debate already completed or failed, returns the
current status instead of raising an error.

schema.title: Response Cancel Debate Api V1 Debate  Debate Id  Cancel Post

post.description:
Force-reset a stuck 'running' debate to 'failed'.

Use this when a debate is stuck in 'running' state after a crash
or server restart. Only operates on debates with status 'running'.

schema.title: Response Force Reset Debate Api V1 Debate  Debate Id  Force Reset Post

post.description:
Submit an out-of-band input for a running debate.

The input is queued and will be consumed by the next agent that matches
the routing target.  Emits an SSE event for visualization.

put.description:
Assign or update documents for a pending debate.

Can be called before or after debate creation, but only while the
debate is still pending (not yet started).

schema.title: Response Assign Documents Api V1 Debate  Debate Id  Documents Put

get.description:
List all forks originating from a given debate (P4).

Allows tracing the fork tree of a debate.

schema.title: Response List Forks Api V1 Debate  Debate Id  Forks Get

post.description:
Internal hook triggered after a debate transitions to completed status (P3).

Creates a DMS document with the debate transcript for future RAG retrieval.

schema.title: Response On Debate Completed Hook Api V1 Debate On Completed Post

get.description:
SSE endpoint for real-time debate updates.

Accepts ``project_id`` as a **query parameter** because the browser's
``EventSource`` API cannot send custom HTTP headers.

parameters.name: project_id

schema.description: Case/project UUID (query param, since EventSource cannot send headers)
schema.title: Project Id

parameters.description: Case/project UUID (query param, since EventSource cannot send headers)

post.description:
Inject user context into a running debate.

The injected content will be available to agents in subsequent turns.
Non-blocking — the debate continues while the injection is queued.

Respond to an agent's clarification query.

Resolves the active interrupt and allows the debate workflow to resume.

Pause or resume a running debate.

When paused, the workflow will check the pause state at each node
boundary and wait until resumed.

Submit an extension request for additional debate rounds.

Called by the workflow when consensus is not reached and extra rounds
are enabled. Creates an interrupt that the moderator can respond to.

schema.title: Response Request Extension Api V1 Debate  Debate Id  Extension Request Post

post.description:
Respond to an extension request — grant or deny extra rounds.

Called by the moderator (or user) to decide whether additional rounds
should be debated.

get.description: Get the current HITL status for a debate.
Get interaction history for a debate (paginated).

Return all audit events for a debate, ordered by round.

Accepts either a debate UUID or a debate title as the path parameter.
If a title is provided, it is resolved to the matching debate ID first.

Events are enriched with actual agent output content from the debate store.
Falls back to workflow audit_log table for MVP debates.

schema.title: Response Get Audit Events Api V1 Audit  Debate Id Or Title  Get

get.description: Return audit events for a project, ordered by timestamp desc.

schema.title: Response Get Audit Events By Project Api V1 Audit Project  Project Id  Get

get.description: Get all application settings.

schema.title: Response Get Settings Api V1 Config Settings Get
Response Update Settings Api V1 Config Settings Put

get.description: Get settings for a specific project (merged with global defaults).

schema.title: Response Get Project Settings Api V1 Config Settings Project  Project Id  Get

get.description: Get the current UI language.

schema.title: Response Get Language Api V1 Config Language Get
Response Set Language Api V1 Config Language Put

get.description: Return the current application version from the single source of truth.

post.description:
Create a new backup archive.

Creates a ZIP file containing all critical user data
(projects, audit DB, configs, etc.).

schema.title: Response Create Backup Api V1 Config Backup Post

get.description: List all available backups with metadata.

schema.title: Response List Backups Api V1 Config Backups Get

delete.description: Delete a backup archive.

schema.title: Response Delete Backup Api V1 Config Backups  Backup Id  Delete

get.description: Get metadata for a specific backup.

schema.title: Response Get Backup Api V1 Config Backups  Backup Id  Get

get.description: List all files contained in a backup.

schema.title: Response List Backup Files Api V1 Config Backups  Backup Id  Files Get

post.description:
Verify the integrity of a backup.

Checks the ZIP structure and validates SHA-256 checksums.

schema.title: Response Verify Backup Api V1 Config Backups  Backup Id  Verify Post

post.description:
Restore data from a backup.

.. warning::
    This is a DESTRUCTIVE operation — it will overwrite existing data.

schema.title: Response Restore Backup Api V1 Config Backups  Backup Id  Restore Post

get.description: Get current backup settings.

schema.title: Response Get Backup Settings Api V1 Config Backup Settings Get
Response Update Backup Settings Api V1 Config Backup Settings Put

get.description: Get current OCR configuration from settings.yaml (merged with defaults).
Get the current utility LLM configuration.

post.description: Set or clear the utility LLM profile.
Validate whether a given profile is suitable as utility LLM.

get.description: List documents in the active project.

post.description: Upload a document to the active project.

get.description: Get a single document with its content for viewing.

delete.description: Delete a document from the active project.

put.description: Update the extracted text of a document (re-chunks and re-indexes).

post.description:
Move a document to another project.

Source project is determined by the ``X-Project-Id`` header.
The document is removed from the source project's DMS and
re-created in the target project's DMS (with a new document ID).

Add a document to manual RAG context.

Returns 404 if the document does not belong to the active project.
This prevents a caller from injecting a foreign document_id into the
active project's manual RAG selection set.

delete.description: Remove a document from manual RAG context.

get.description: List document IDs in manual RAG context.
Search RAG context for relevant chunks.

Check which OCR engines are available for image text extraction.

Returns:
    Dict with ``available`` (bool) and ``engine`` (str or null)
    indicating the available OCR engine ("paddleocr", "easyocr",
    "tesseract", or null).

post.description:
Analyze documents in the project and produce a structured case analysis.

Uses the utility LLM to summarize, extract key facts, parties,
timeline, and issues from all uploaded documents.

Two modes:
- ``full`` (default): Re-analyze all documents from scratch.
- ``update``: Merge new documents into an existing analysis without
  re-processing already analyzed documents.

parameters.name: mode

schema.description: Analysis mode: 'full' (regenerate all) or 'update' (merge new docs only)
schema.title: Mode

parameters.description: Analysis mode: 'full' (regenerate all) or 'update' (merge new docs only)

get.description: Get the stored document analysis for the current project.

post.description: Export the document analysis as PDF, ODT, or Markdown.

get.description:
List ALL debates across all cases in a tenant (newest first).

Aggregates debates from every case belonging to the tenant,
enriching each item with case title, tenant name, and tag information.

schema.title: Response List Tenant Debates Api V1 Tenants  Tenant Id  Debates Get

get.description: List debates in a case (newest first).

schema.title: Response List Case Debates Api V1 Tenants  Tenant Id  Cases  Case Id  Debates Get

post.description: Create a new debate within a case (status = pending).

get.description: Get a single debate's status and progress.

delete.description: Delete a debate and its associated audit events.

schema.title: Response Delete Case Debate Api V1 Tenants  Tenant Id  Cases  Case Id  Debates  Debate Id  Delete

post.description: Start a pending debate — launches the workflow in a background task.
Cancel a running debate (idempotent).

schema.title: Response Cancel Case Debate Api V1 Tenants  Tenant Id  Cases  Case Id  Debates  Debate Id  Cancel Post

post.description: Force-reset a stuck 'running' debate to 'failed' (idempotent).

schema.title: Response Force Reset Case Debate Api V1 Tenants  Tenant Id  Cases  Case Id  Debates  Debate Id  Force Reset Post

post.description: Submit an out-of-band input for a running debate in a case.

get.description: List all forks originating from a given debate in a case.

schema.title: Response List Case Forks Api V1 Tenants  Tenant Id  Cases  Case Id  Debates  Debate Id  Forks Get

get.description: List documents in the case DMS.

post.description: Upload a document to the case DMS.

get.description: Get a single document with its content for viewing.

delete.description: Delete a document from the case DMS.

post.description:
Add a document to the RAG index for a case.

Multi-tenant safety: the underlying ``add_to_rag_context`` validates
that the document belongs to the active project; if it does not, the
call returns 404 rather than silently attaching a foreign document.

delete.description: Remove a document from the RAG index for a case.

get.description: Search the RAG index for a case (hybrid retriever, project-scoped).

post.description: Analyze all documents in the case DMS.

get.description: Get the latest analysis for the case DMS.

List audit events for a debate within a case.

Falls back to workflow audit_log table for MVP debates (same logic as
the legacy ``/api/v1/audit`` endpoint).

post.description:
Start a workflow within a case context.

Delegates to the workflow_exec router but resolves the project_id
from the tenant/case path.

get.description: Get workflow execution state within a case context.

Return a case-scoped summary suitable for the Workspace view.

The endpoint is intentionally read-only and aggregate-only — the
actual entities (debates, documents, tags) are loaded separately
by the frontend.  The summary exists so the Workspace can render
a first paint without N+1 round-trips.

Typeahead endpoint for the Case selector in the Workspace header.

Returns up to ``limit`` cases whose title or tags contain ``q``
(case-insensitive substring match).  The store handles the
tenant-scope filtering; the endpoint is read-only.

schema.title: Response Search Cases Api V1 Cases Search Get

get.description:
Return all Inbox items for the caller's tenant.

Iterates the tenant's cases and aggregates items from each
case-scoped debate store.  Limited to ``INBOX_DEFAULT_LIMIT``
items total; if more exist, the oldest by ``updated_at`` are
dropped (the UI is told via the response that the inbox is
partial — a future phase can add pagination).

post.description:
Move the listed debates to ``target_case_id``.

Implementation: DebateStore.move_to_case() (already shipped in
Phase 1.x) handles the file-IO.  This endpoint is the
orchestration layer that enforces tenant safety and
partial-success reporting.

Add the listed tags to each debate.

An empty ``tag_ids`` is a no-op (200, all in ``succeeded``).
Existing tags are kept (idempotent union).

Archive (soft-remove) the listed debates from their case stores.

Implementation: the legacy archive view marks the debate's case
with an ``archived_at`` timestamp; in P2 we simply remove the
debate from its case store.  A future phase can replace this
with a soft-delete flag.

get.description:
Return the three booleans the Welcome-Card consumes.

The counts are best-effort and use the same stores the
WorkspaceView already touches.  We don't open a separate
document store query — documents are tracked per project, not
per tenant, and a tenant-wide document count is not a useful
onboarding signal.

The function never raises: if a store is unavailable the
corresponding boolean is False, which makes the Welcome-Card
render with that card hidden rather than crash the dashboard.
Return the 1-hop (or up to 2-hop) subgraph around one entity.
Return a tenant-wide subgraph (capped at ``limit`` cases).

Return metadata for one edge (kind, weight, evidence).

Phase 4.3 / 5.2: delegates to
:class:`GraphEdgeCacheService` which materialises edges from
the audit log.  When no evidence is found the response carries
a short placeholder so the UI can still render a "no evidence
yet" hint without falling back to a hard error.

parameters.name: case_id

schema.description: Optional case id.  When supplied, the service is scoped to that case's tenant and only that case's audit events are considered.  When omitted, the active tenant is inferred from the auth context (TODO Phase 7).
schema.title: Case Id

parameters.description: Optional case id.  When supplied, the service is scoped to that case's tenant and only that case's audit events are considered.  When omitted, the active tenant is inferred from the auth context (TODO Phase 7).

get.description: List all LLM profiles eligible for utility/background tasks.

schema.title: Response List Service Eligible Llm Profiles Api V1 Profiles Llm Service Eligible Get

get.description: List all available LLM profiles.

schema.title: Response List Llm Profiles Api V1 Profiles Llm Get

post.description: Create a new LLM profile.

get.description: Get a specific LLM profile by ID.

delete.description: Delete an LLM profile.

schema.title: Response Delete Llm Profile Api V1 Profiles Llm  Profile Id  Delete

get.description:
List all available components for the Prompt Composer UI.

Returns all four component types in a single call:
  - agent_cores: functional role definitions
  - argumentation_patterns: argumentation methodologies
  - tone_profiles: communication style profiles
  - prompt_modifiers: output formatting modifiers

schema.title: Response List Composition Components Api V1 Profiles Composition Components Get

get.description: Estimate the cost of a debate run.

schema.title: Response Estimate Cost Api V1 Profiles Cost Estimate Get

get.description: List all installed modules with DB status.

schema.title: Response List Modules Api V1 Modules  Get

get.description:
List modules available for installation from the official registry.

Currently returns an empty list — all modules are discovered from the
local `modules/` directory. A remote registry may be added later.

schema.title: Response List Available Modules Api V1 Modules Available Get

get.description:
Fetch the module index from the danwa-modules GitHub repository.

Returns all available modules with version, download URL, checksum,
and (for language packs) translation stats.

Results are cached server-side for 24 hours; pass ``force_refresh=true``
to bypass.

parameters.name: force_refresh

schema.description: Bypass cache and fetch fresh index
schema.title: Force Refresh

parameters.description: Bypass cache and fetch fresh index

schema.title: Response Get Repo Index Api V1 Modules Repo Index Get

post.description:
Install a module directly from the danwa-modules GitHub release.

Fetches the repo index, resolves the correct version, validates
dependencies, then downloads and installs the ZIP from GitHub Releases.

Returns an ``InstallationReport`` with status, files installed, and
any errors or warnings (including unresolved dependencies).

schema.title: Response Install Module From Repo Api V1 Modules Install From Repo Post

get.description:
Compare installed module versions against the danwa-modules repo index.

Uses semver comparison — any remote version strictly greater than the
installed version is listed as an available update.

Returns a list of ``{module_id, current_version, available_version,
download_url, checksum_sha256, name}`` dicts.

schema.title: Response Check Repo Updates Api V1 Modules Check Repo Updates Get

get.description: Get detailed info about a specific module.

schema.title: Response Get Module Api V1 Modules  Module Id  Get

get.description: Get the parsed profile data for a module, merged with manifest metadata.

schema.title: Response Get Module Profile Api V1 Modules  Module Id  Profile Get
Response Update Module Profile Api V1 Modules  Module Id  Profile Put

post.description: Duplicate a module with a new ID.

schema.title: Response Duplicate Module Api V1 Modules  Module Id  Duplicate Post

post.description: Install a module from local files or a URL.

schema.title: Response Install Module Api V1 Modules Install Post

post.description: Uninstall a module.

schema.title: Response Uninstall Module Api V1 Modules  Module Id  Uninstall Post

put.description: Update a module to the latest available version.

schema.title: Response Update Module Api V1 Modules  Module Id  Update Put

post.description: Validate a module manifest without installing it.

schema.title: Response Validate Module Api V1 Modules Validate Post

post.description: Enable (activate) a module.

schema.title: Response Enable Module Api V1 Modules  Module Id  Enable Post

post.description: Disable (deactivate) a module.

schema.title: Response Disable Module Api V1 Modules  Module Id  Disable Post

post.description: Export a module as a ZIP archive for sharing/uploading to GitHub.

schema.title: Response Export Module Api V1 Modules  Module Id  Export Post

post.description:
Export DB profiles as module directories under modules/.

Reads profiles from the blueprint DB and writes them as module
directories (manifest.json + profile file).  Used to bridge the
gap between the Manage views (DB-sourced) and the Modules views
(filesystem-sourced).

schema.title: Response Sync From Db Api V1 Modules Sync From Db Post

get.description: Get the list of supported target languages for translation.

schema.title: Response Get Supported Languages Api V1 Translation Supported Languages Get

post.description:
Translate a module's content to the target language.

Performs a two-pass translation with optional back-translation QA:
1. Forward translation: EN source → target language
2. (Optional) Back-translation: target → EN for quality verification
3. Semantic comparison to compute quality score
4. Auto-approval if quality meets threshold

Returns detailed status including per-file quality scores.

schema.title: Response Translate Module Api V1 Translation  Module Id  Translate Post

post.description:
Manually approve or reject a specific translation.

Args:
    module_id: The module ID
    file_path: The file path within the module
    approved: True to approve, False to reject

Returns:
    Success status

schema.title: Response Approve Translation Api V1 Translation  Module Id  Approve Post

get.description:
Get the translation status for all files in a module.

Returns per-file details including quality scores and approval status.

schema.title: Response Get Translation Status Api V1 Translation  Module Id  Status Get

get.description:
Get translation statistics for a module.

Returns per-language breakdown of total, translated, approved, and average quality.

schema.title: Response Get Translation Statistics Api V1 Translation  Module Id  Statistics Get

post.description:
Invalidate cached translations to force re-translation.

Args:
    module_id: The module ID
    file_path: If specified, only this file is invalidated
    target_language: If specified, only this language is invalidated

Returns:
    Number of entries invalidated

schema.title: Response Invalidate Translation Api V1 Translation  Module Id  Invalidate Post

post.description:
Translate multiple modules to the same target language.

Translates each module sequentially. For parallel translation,
use the async endpoint when available.

schema.title: Response Batch Translate Api V1 Translation Batch Translate Post

get.description: Dynamically discovered list of supported locales with metadata.

schema.title: Response Get Supported Locales Api V1 I18N Locales Get

post.description: Register a new custom locale not in the default set.

schema.title: Response Register Locale Api V1 I18N Locales Post

get.description: Übersetzungsstatistiken pro Sprache.

schema.title: Response Get Stats Api V1 I18N Stats Get

get.description: Coverage-Report für alle Sprachen.

schema.title: Response Get Coverage Api V1 I18N Coverage Get

get.description: Per-locale string details with translation status, source, dates.

schema.title: Response Get Locale Strings Api V1 I18N Strings  Locale  Get

get.description: List all custom-registered locales.

schema.title: Response List Custom Locales Api V1 I18N Custom Locales Get

get.description: List all translation jobs.

schema.title: Response List Translation Jobs Api V1 I18N Bulk Translate Get

post.description: Start an async bulk translation job. Returns job_id for polling.

schema.title: Response Bulk Translate Api V1 I18N Bulk Translate Post

post.description: Delete all translations for a locale. Use before re-translating.

schema.title: Response Wipe Locale Api V1 I18N  Locale  Wipe Post

get.description: Get the status and progress of a translation job.

schema.title: Response Get Translation Job Status Api V1 I18N Bulk Translate  Job Id  Status Get

get.description:
Übersetzungen für eine Sprache abrufen.

When merge_langpacks is True (default), strings from language-pack
namespaces (langpack:*) are merged on top of the global namespace.
Always returns translations — falls back to global namespace if locale
is not explicitly registered (e.g. language-pack modules installed from repo).

schema.title: Response Get Translations Api V1 I18N  Locale  Get

post.description: Mehrere Übersetzungen für eine Sprache setzen.

schema.title: Response Set Translations Api V1 I18N  Locale  Post

get.description: Einzelne Übersetzung abrufen.

schema.title: Response Get Single Translation Api V1 I18N  Locale   Key  Get
Response Update Translation Api V1 I18N  Locale   Key  Put

delete.description: Übersetzung löschen.

schema.title: Response Delete Translation Api V1 I18N  Locale   Key  Delete

post.description:
Export all UI translations for a locale as a Language Pack ZIP.

Creates a ZIP archive containing:
- manifest.json (ModuleManifest with type=language-pack)
- ui_strings.json (key-value pairs for the locale)

schema.title: Response Export Language Pack Api V1 I18N  Locale  Export As Pack Post

get.description:
Comprehensive health check.

Returns 200 if all services are healthy, 503 if any are degraded.
Checks: SQLite, Redis (if configured), ChromaDB (if available).

post.description:
Reload all profiles from YAML files.

Forces ProfileService and PromptService singletons to re-read
their YAML/markdown files from disk. Also clears the workflow
nodes' cached ProfileService instances so running debates pick
up the updated profiles immediately.

schema.title: Response Reload Profiles Api V1 System Reload Profiles Post

get.description:
Return recent backend log lines.

Reads the last N lines from the log file, optionally filtered by a search term.

schema.title: Response Get Logs Api V1 System Logs Get

get.description:
Get current LLM activity status.

Returns active calls, recent history, and token totals.
Designed to be polled every 3-5 seconds by the frontend header.

schema.title: Response Get Llm Activity Api V1 Monitor Activity Get

get.description: List agent blueprints with optional active-only filter and pagination.

schema.title: Response List Agent Blueprints Api V1 Blueprints Agent Blueprints Get

post.description: Create a new agent blueprint.

get.description: Get a single agent blueprint by ID.

delete.description: Delete an agent blueprint.

schema.title: Response Delete Agent Blueprint Api V1 Blueprints Agent Blueprints  Blueprint Id  Delete

get.description: List agent bundles with optional active-only filter and pagination, including enabled module bundles.

schema.title: Response List Bundles Api V1 Blueprints Bundles Get

post.description:
Create a new agent bundle.

Validates that all referenced entities (LLM profile, RoleType, etc.) exist.

get.description: Get a single agent bundle by ID — checks DB first, then modules.

delete.description: Delete an agent bundle.

schema.title: Response Delete Bundle Api V1 Blueprints Bundles  Bundle Id  Delete

get.description: Resolve a bundle — load all referenced entities and assemble system prompt.
Export a bundle as a portable JSON document with all dependencies.

schema.title: Response Export Bundle Endpoint Api V1 Blueprints Bundles  Bundle Id  Export Get

post.description:
Import a bundle from an exported JSON document.

Conflict strategies:
- ``skip``: Skip entities that already exist by ID.
- ``overwrite``: Replace existing entities.
- ``rename``: Generate new IDs for conflicts (default).

get.description: List all LLM profiles with pagination, including enabled module profiles.

schema.title: Response List Llm Profiles Api V1 Blueprints Llm Profiles Get

post.description: Create a new LLM profile.

get.description: Get a single LLM profile by ID (DB or module).

delete.description: Delete an LLM profile.

schema.title: Response Delete Llm Profile Api V1 Blueprints Llm Profiles  Profile Id  Delete

get.description: List all available argumentation pattern names, including enabled module patterns.

schema.title: Response List Argumentation Patterns Api V1 Blueprints Argumentation Patterns Get

get.description:
Get all role prompts for a given argumentation pattern.

Returns a mapping of role_type_id → prompt content string.

schema.title: Response Get Argumentation Pattern Api V1 Blueprints Argumentation Patterns  Name  Get

get.description: List all workflow definitions with pagination.

schema.title: Response List Workflow Definitions Api V1 Blueprints Workflows Get

post.description: Create a new workflow definition.

get.description: Get a single workflow definition by ID.

delete.description: Delete a workflow definition.

schema.title: Response Delete Workflow Definition Api V1 Blueprints Workflows  Wf Id  Delete

post.description: Compile a workflow definition — validate blueprint references.

Clone a workflow definition.

Creates a deep copy with a new ID, incremented version, and
``is_locked=False``.

Create a custom template from an existing WorkflowDefinition.

Request body: ``{"name": "...", "description": "...", "extracted_placeholders": ["key1"]}``

Fields listed in ``extracted_placeholders`` are replaced with
``{{key}}`` placeholders in the template data.

get.description: List canvas layouts with optional project filter and pagination.

schema.title: Response List Layouts Api V1 Canvas Layouts Get

post.description: Create a new canvas layout.

get.description: Get a single canvas layout by ID.

delete.description: Delete a canvas layout.

schema.title: Response Delete Layout Api V1 Canvas Layouts  Layout Id  Delete

post.description:
Convert a canvas layout to a WorkflowDefinition and persist it.

Takes the canvas layout's ``layout_data`` (nodes + edges with positions)
and transforms it into a structured ``WorkflowDefinition`` with typed
nodes, edges, entry point, and termination conditions.

The resulting WorkflowDefinition is saved to the repository and can then
be compiled and executed via ``POST /workflow-exec/{wf_id}/start``.

get.description:
SSE endpoint for real-time blueprint/canvas updates.

If ``session_id`` is provided, subscribes to the event bus for that
workflow session and yields workflow-specific events (node updates,
completion, errors, interjections, etc.).

If no ``session_id`` is provided, falls back to a keep-alive stream
for general canvas updates.

parameters.name: session_id

schema.description: Workflow session ID to subscribe to
schema.title: Session Id

parameters.description: Workflow session ID to subscribe to

post.description:
Create and execute an MVP debate workflow with per-agent LLM profiles.

Builds a 4-agent debate (strategist → critic → optimizer → moderator)
where each agent uses its own dedicated LLM profile, compiles it via
WorkflowCompiler, and launches execution as a background task.

Start executing a workflow definition.

Uses the project_id from the X-Project-Id header (not the body)
to ensure debate records are stored in the correct project.

get.description:
Get the current execution state for a workflow session.

Returns the latest state snapshot from SQLite.

post.description:
Pause a running workflow.

Sets the pause flag; the workflow will check this between nodes.

Resume a paused workflow.

Clears the pause flag and signals the pause event.

Cancel a running or paused workflow.

Sets a cancellation flag that the workflow checks between nodes.
Idempotent: if already completed/failed/cancelled, returns current status.

get.description:
SSE endpoint for real-time workflow execution events.

Subscribes to the event bus and yields events as they are published
by workflow nodes.

post.description:
Submit a user interjection for a running workflow session.

The interjection is queued and will be consumed by the next
interjection node in the workflow graph.  Emits an SSE event
for frontend visualization.

get.description:
Return audit log entries for a workflow session.

Used by the frontend to display the audit trail for MVP debates.

schema.title: Response Get Workflow Audit Log Api V1 Workflow Exec  Session Id  Audit Log Get

get.description:
Return phase-level state snapshots for a workflow session.

Phase snapshots are saved at gate nodes and provide a state
checkpoint for each phase boundary, useful for debugging and
comparing state before/after phase transitions.

schema.title: Response Get Phase Snapshots Api V1 Workflow Exec  Session Id  Phase Snapshots Get

get.description: Return the full state for a specific phase checkpoint.

schema.title: Response Get Phase Snapshot Detail Api V1 Workflow Exec  Session Id  Phase Snapshots  Node Id  Get

delete.description:
Soft-delete a workflow session (sets ``is_archived = 1``).

The session data is preserved but excluded from default listings.
Use ``POST /{session_id}/restore`` to un-archive.

post.description: Restore an archived workflow session (sets ``is_archived = 0``).

Create an async report generation job.

Returns immediately with a ``job_id``.  The report is generated in the
background and can be downloaded via ``GET /api/v1/reports/{job_id}/download``
once the status is ``"completed"``.

get.description: Get the status of a report generation job.

Download a completed report file.

Returns a ``FileResponse`` with the appropriate media type.
Raises 404 if the job is not found or not yet completed.

SSE endpoint for real-time report generation progress.

Yields ``report.progress`` events for all report jobs belonging to
the given session.
List all workflow templates (system + custom + modules), filterable by category.

schema.title: Response List Workflow Templates Api V1 Workflow Templates Get

post.description:
Create a new custom workflow template.

``is_system`` is always forced to ``False`` for API-created templates.

get.description:
Get a single workflow template by ID.

Falls back to module workflow templates if not found in the DB.

put.description:
Update an existing workflow template.

System templates cannot be updated (HTTP 403).

delete.description:
Delete a workflow template.

System templates cannot be deleted (HTTP 403).

schema.title: Response Delete Workflow Template Api V1 Workflow Templates  Template Id  Delete

post.description:
Instantiate a workflow template into a concrete WorkflowDefinition.

1. Load the template.
2. Resolve default_role placeholders from installed agent cores.
3. Check for missing required placeholders.
4. Merge defaults and instantiate.
5. Validate blueprint_ref placeholders against the catalog.
6. Validate the resulting graph structure.
7. Create and persist a new WorkflowDefinition.

get.description:
Return all available components across all 5 categories.

Returns agent_cores, argumentation_patterns, tone_profiles,
prompt_modifiers, and llm_profiles for populating dropdowns.

schema.title: Response List Components Api V1 Bundle Composer Components Get

post.description:
Preview the assembled system prompt without persisting.

Accepts the four component IDs and returns the concatenated prompt.

schema.title: Response Preview Prompt Api V1 Bundle Composer Preview Post

post.description: Create a new AgentBundle from modular composition.

get.description: List agent bundles, optionally filtering to active only.

schema.title: Response List Bundles Api V1 Bundle Composer Bundles Get

get.description: Get a single agent bundle by ID.

post.description:
Export a bundle as portable manifest + profile.

When ``to_directory=true``, writes to modules/agent-bundles/<id>/ on disk.
Returns the manifest and profile dicts (or the directory path).

schema.title: Response Export Bundle Api V1 Bundle Composer Bundles  Bundle Id  Export Post

post.description: Import a bundle from modules/agent-bundles/<module_id>/ on disk.

get.description: List all tone profiles (system + custom + modules), filterable via include_system.

schema.title: Response List Tone Profiles Api V1 Tone Profiles Get

Create a new custom tone profile.

``is_system`` is always forced to ``False`` for API-created profiles.

get.description: Get a single tone profile by ID — checks DB first, then modules.

put.description:
Update an existing tone profile.

System profiles cannot be updated (HTTP 403).

delete.description:
Delete a tone profile.

System profiles cannot be deleted (HTTP 403).

schema.title: Response Delete Tone Profile Api V1 Tone Profiles  Profile Id  Delete

post.description:
Discover the capabilities of an external A2A agent.

Fetches the agent's Agent Card and returns structured capability info.

Returns:
    Dict with name, description, version, capabilities, skills,
    input_modes, output_modes.

Raises:
    HTTP 400: Invalid URL format.
    HTTP 403: Private IP blocked.
    HTTP 502: Agent unreachable.
    HTTP 504: Discovery timed out.

schema.title: Response Discover A2A Agent Api V1 A2A Discover Post

post.description:
Store discovered A2A capabilities in a blueprint LLM profile.

Args:
    profile_id: The blueprint LLM profile ID to update.
    body: The discovered capabilities.

Returns:
    Dict with status and profile_id.

Raises:
    HTTP 404: Profile not found.

schema.title: Response Store A2A Capabilities Api V1 A2A Capabilities  Profile Id  Post

get.description: List all registered output plugins with their config schemas.

schema.title: Response List Output Plugins Api V1 Output Plugins Get

the output directory.

get.description:
Download a generated output file.

Args:
    job_id: The render job ID.
    file_index: Index of the file in output_files (default 0).

List input jobs with optional filters.

Query parameters:

get.description: Get the status and metadata of an input job.

post.description: Approve a pending A2A inbound request.

schema.title: Response Approve A2A Api V1 Input A2A  Task Id  Approve Post

post.description: Reject a pending A2A inbound request.

schema.title: Response Reject A2A Api V1 Input A2A  Task Id  Reject Post

post.description:
STT audio streaming endpoint.

Receives audio blobs via POST body and returns Server-Sent Events (SSE)
with ``event: partial`` for intermediate results and ``event: final``
for the completed transcript.

The request body should be raw audio bytes (WebM/Opus or WAV).
Query parameters:
- ``profile_id``: LLM profile ID with protocol='stt' (optional, uses default)
- ``language``: Language code (default: 'de')

Reserved endpoint for future MCP server integration.

Currently returns 501 Not Implemented.

schema.title: Response Mcp Tools Call Api V1 Mcp Tools Call Post

post.description:
Launch a workflow execution from a completed input job.

Takes a completed InputJob (with its DebateInput artifact), resolves
a workflow definition, and starts execution via the workflow runner.

This bridges the Input Composer pipeline to the Workflow Execution
pipeline — the missing link between input capture and debate execution.

Create a new chat session with the Danwa assistant.

Args:
    title: Optional title for the session.
    profile_id: Optional LLM profile ID to use for this session.

Returns:
    Session object with ID and metadata.

schema.title: Response Create Session Api V1 Assistant Sessions Post

get.description:
List all active chat sessions.

Returns:
    List of session summaries (no message content).

schema.title: Response List Sessions Api V1 Assistant Sessions Get

get.description:
Get a specific chat session with full message history.

Args:
    session_id: The session ID.

Returns:
    Session object with all messages.

Raises:
    HTTP 404: Session not found.

schema.title: Response Get Session Api V1 Assistant Sessions  Session Id  Get

delete.description:
Delete a chat session.

Args:
    session_id: The session ID.

Returns:
    Status message.

Raises:
    HTTP 404: Session not found.

post.description:
Send a message to the Danwa assistant and get a response.

Args:
    session_id: The session ID.
    message: The user's message.
    profile_id: Optional LLM profile override.

Returns:
    Contains ``messages`` (array of all new messages from this turn,
    including tool calls and results) and ``message`` (the final
    assistant text response for backward compatibility).

Raises:
    HTTP 404: Session not found.
    HTTP 500: LLM call failed.

schema.title: Response Send Message Api V1 Assistant Sessions  Session Id  Chat Post

post.description:
Quick chat endpoint — creates a session if needed and sends a message.

This is a convenience endpoint for single-message interactions without
explicit session management.

Args:
    message: The user's message.
    profile_id: Optional LLM profile override.

Returns:
    Session ID and all new messages from this turn.

schema.title: Response Quick Chat Api V1 Assistant Chat Post

get.description:
A2A Agent Card — discovery endpoint.

Returns the Agent Card JSON so external A2A clients can discover
Danwa's capabilities, available projects, and supported languages.

post.description:
A2A JSON-RPC endpoint — handles all A2A methods.

Supported methods:
- ``tasks/send`` — create and start a debate
- ``tasks/get`` — poll for task status/result
- ``tasks/cancel`` — cancel a running task

role.title: Role
role.description: Role name for the A2A agent in the debate

position.title: Position
position.description: Where to insert the A2A agent: 'after_all', 'after:critic', 'before:moderator', etc.

A2AAgentConfig.title: A2AAgentConfig
A2AAgentConfig.description: Configuration for an external A2A agent participating in the debate.

AgentBlueprint.title: AgentBlueprint
AgentBlueprint.description:
A reusable agent configuration combining LLM, role, and prompt.

The composite model — ties together an LLM profile, a role definition,
and optionally a prompt template into a reusable debate agent
configuration.

model_params.title: Model Params
model_params.description: LLM inference overrides (temperature, top_p, top_k, frequency_penalty, presence_penalty, etc.)

AgentBundle.title: AgentBundle
AgentBundle.description:
A reusable composition of LLM + Role-Type + Persona + Prompt + Tone Profile.

Represents a complete debate agent configuration that can be placed
as a node on the Canvas and referenced in Workflows.  Unlike
``AgentBlueprint`` (which ties LLM + RoleDefinition + PromptTemplate
together), a Bundle is more flexible: it references a RoleType directly
and optionally includes a ToneProfile.

AgentConfig.title: AgentConfig
AgentConfig.description:
Configuration for a single debate agent.

The ``role`` field accepts any string (typically a RoleType.id).
For backward compatibility, legacy AgentRole enum values are also accepted.

AgentOutput.title: AgentOutput
AgentOutput.description: Output produced by one agent in one round.

approved.title: Approved
approved.description: Set to True to approve, False to reject

ApproveTranslationRequest.title: ApproveTranslationRequest
ApproveTranslationRequest.description: Request body for manual translation approval.

BackupCreateBody.title: BackupCreateBody
BackupCreateBody.description: Request body to create a backup.

BackupRestoreBody.title: BackupRestoreBody
BackupRestoreBody.description:
Request body to restore a backup.

.. warning::
    This operation is destructive and overwrites existing data.
    The function is a placeholder and not yet implemented.

BackupSettingsBody.title: BackupSettingsBody
BackupSettingsBody.description: Request body for backup settings update.

module_ids.title: Module Ids
module_ids.description: List of module IDs to translate

parallel.title: Parallel
parallel.description: Translate modules in parallel (requires async support)

BatchTranslateRequest.title: BatchTranslateRequest
BatchTranslateRequest.description: Request body for batch translation of multiple modules.

BlueprintLLMProfile.title: BlueprintLLMProfile
BlueprintLLMProfile.description:
LLM configuration for use in Agent Blueprints.

Extends the concept of ``backend.core.profiles.LLMProfile`` with
blueprint-specific metadata (description, tags, timestamps).

BundleComposition.title: BundleComposition
BundleComposition.description:
Modul-Referenzen für die Composer-Assembly — KEINE Inline-Daten.

References module IDs from the ``modules/`` directory tree, NOT
database primary keys.  At resolve time the actual content is loaded
from the module filesystem (or a future ``danwa-modules`` resolver).

FUTURE: Dependency resolver from ``danwa-modules`` repo on GitHub
will automatically fetch missing dependencies.

CanvasLayout.title: CanvasLayout
CanvasLayout.description: A saved canvas arrangement of agent blueprints.

CanvasLayoutData.title: CanvasLayoutData
CanvasLayoutData.description:
Simplified canvas layout data — NOT raw React Flow JSON.

Translation to full Svelte Flow format happens in the frontend on load.

CanvasLayoutEdge.title: CanvasLayoutEdge
CanvasLayoutEdge.description: An edge in the simplified canvas layout format.

CanvasLayoutNode.title: CanvasLayoutNode
CanvasLayoutNode.description: A node in the simplified canvas layout format.

CapabilitiesRequest.title: CapabilitiesRequest
CapabilitiesRequest.description: Request body for storing A2A capabilities.

CaseInput.title: CaseInput
CaseInput.description: The case or topic to debate.

CaseListItem.title: CaseListItem
CaseListItem.description: Lightweight case summary for list views.

CaseSearchHit.title: CaseSearchHit
CaseSearchHit.description: Single result for GET /api/cases/search (typeahead for the Case selector).

Composition.title: Composition
Composition.description: The four component IDs that define an agent's system prompt.

ConditionalEdge.title: ConditionalEdge
ConditionalEdge.description: An edge with a condition expression for branching logic.

max_rounds.title: Max Rounds
max_rounds.description: Default max rounds for termination condition

consensus_threshold.title: Consensus Threshold
consensus_threshold.description: Default consensus threshold for termination condition

ConvertToWorkflowRequest.title: ConvertToWorkflowRequest
ConvertToWorkflowRequest.description: Request body for converting a canvas layout to a workflow definition.

CreateBundleRequest.title: CreateBundleRequest
CreateBundleRequest.description: Request body for creating a composer bundle.

CreateRenderRequest.title: CreateRenderRequest
CreateRenderRequest.description: Request body for starting a render job.

CreateRenderResponse.title: CreateRenderResponse
CreateRenderResponse.description: Response after creating a render job.

CreateReportRequest.title: CreateReportRequest
CreateReportRequest.description: Request body for creating a report job.

CreateReportResponse.title: CreateReportResponse
CreateReportResponse.description: Response after creating a report job.

DebateListItem.title: DebateListItem
DebateListItem.description: GET /api/v1/debate list item — lightweight summary for history.

agent_profile.title: Agent Profile
agent_profile.description: List of agent configurations. Each role is a RoleType.id. Default: legacy 4-role setup (strategist, critic, optimizer, moderator). For custom roles, provide explicit list with bundle_id references.

bundle_ids.title: Bundle Ids
bundle_ids.description: AgentBundle IDs to use for debate agents. If provided, overrides agent_profile defaults.

llm_profile_id.title: Llm Profile Id
llm_profile_id.description: LLM profile to use (empty = service default)

agent_persona_ids.title: Agent Persona Ids
agent_persona_ids.description: Mapping of agent role to persona ID (e.g. {'strategist': 'strategist-default'})

language.title: Language
language.description: Language for debate prompts. Uses the user's configured UI language if not specified. Supported: de, en, fr, es, it, pt, ru, zh, ja, ko, sv, el, ar, he

document_ids.title: Document Ids
document_ids.description: List of DMS document IDs to include as RAG context for this debate

rag_auto_retrieve.title: Rag Auto Retrieve
rag_auto_retrieve.description: If true, automatically retrieve relevant document chunks based on the case text

include_debate_results.title: Include Debate Results
include_debate_results.description: If true, include results from previous completed debates as RAG context

enable_extra_rounds.title: Enable Extra Rounds
enable_extra_rounds.description: If true, the moderator can request additional rounds when consensus is not reached

a2a_agents.title: A2A Agents
a2a_agents.description: External A2A agents to include as debate participants

prompt_language.title: Prompt Language
prompt_language.description: Actual language of loaded prompts (may differ from requested language if fallback used)

session_id.title: Session Id
session_id.description: Workflow session ID (wf-… format). Set for MVP debates.

DocumentAssignment.title: DocumentAssignment
DocumentAssignment.description: Request body for assigning documents to a debate.

ExtensionDecision.title: ExtensionDecision
ExtensionDecision.description: Decision on whether to grant extra debate rounds.

decision.description: GRANTED to allow extra rounds, DENIED to end debate

ExtensionResponse.title: ExtensionResponse
ExtensionResponse.description: Response after submitting an extension decision.

GraphEdge.title: GraphEdge
GraphEdge.description:
An edge between two nodes.  ``weight`` is unused in Phase 4
but reserved for Phase 5+ derived edges (e.g. embedding
similarity) where multiple edges of the same type can exist
between the same pair of nodes.

GraphNode.title: GraphNode
GraphNode.description:
A single node in the knowledge graph.

The ``id`` is namespaced by type (``case:<id>``, ``debate:<id>``,
``document:<id>``, ``tag:<name>``) so two entities of different
types but the same raw id never collide.

GraphPayload.title: GraphPayload
GraphPayload.description:
The envelope returned by every /api/v1/graph/* endpoint.

``truncated`` + ``total_count`` + ``sampled_count`` are
only meaningful for the global endpoint; the local endpoint
always returns the full 1-hop subgraph.

ImportBundleRequest.title: ImportBundleRequest
ImportBundleRequest.description: Request body for importing a bundle.

ImportRequest.title: ImportRequest
ImportRequest.description: Request body for importing a bundle from directory.

InboxBulkArchiveBody.title: InboxBulkArchiveBody
InboxBulkArchiveBody.description:
Request body for POST /api/v1/inbox/bulk-archive.

Marks the listed debates as archived.  Implementation may either
delete the debates or set an ``archived_at`` flag depending on the
store's policy; in Phase 2 we delete (the legacy archive view
already mirrors this behaviour).

InboxBulkMoveBody.title: InboxBulkMoveBody
InboxBulkMoveBody.description:
Request body for POST /api/v1/inbox/bulk-move.

Moves the listed debates to a new case.  All ids must belong to
the same tenant; the target case must also belong to the same
tenant (enforced server-side).

InboxBulkResult.title: InboxBulkResult
InboxBulkResult.description:
Response body for any /api/v1/inbox/bulk-* endpoint.

``succeeded`` and ``failed`` are mutually exclusive lists.  An item
is in ``failed`` when the store rejected it (e.g. wrong tenant,
not found) — the response is 200, not 4xx, so the UI can show a
partial-success message.

InboxBulkTagBody.title: InboxBulkTagBody
InboxBulkTagBody.description:
Request body for POST /api/v1/inbox/bulk-tag.

Adds the listed tags to each debate.  An empty ``tag_ids`` list is
treated as a no-op (not a 400) so the UI's "remove all tags"
button can submit cleanly without a special endpoint.

InboxDebateItem.title: InboxDebateItem
InboxDebateItem.description:
A debate surfaced on the Inbox because of one of the kinds below.

The "kind" determines which action buttons the UI renders:

- ``recently_completed``  → "Open", "Archive", "View report"
- ``untagged``            → "Add tags", "Open", "Open in Case"
- ``stale_running``       → "Open", "Force reset", "Cancel"

InboxSummary.title: InboxSummary
InboxSummary.description:
Aggregated, tenant-scoped Inbox payload.

The endpoint returns this in a single call to avoid N+1 round-trips
from the frontend when the Inbox view mounts.

content.title: Content
content.description: Context or information to inject into the debate

target_agent.title: Target Agent
target_agent.description: Target agent role (e.g. 'critic'). If None, injected to all future agents in the current and subsequent rounds.

target_round.title: Target Round
target_round.description: Target round number. If None, applies to current and future rounds.

InjectRequest.title: InjectRequest
InjectRequest.description: POST /debate/{id}/inject — user injects context into running debate.

InputJobStatusResponse.title: InputJobStatusResponse
InputJobStatusResponse.description: Response for input job status query.

config_schema.title: Config Schema
config_schema.description: JSON Schema for the plugin's config

InputPluginInfo.title: InputPluginInfo
InputPluginInfo.description: Information about a registered input plugin.

InstallFromRepoRequest.title: InstallFromRepoRequest
InstallFromRepoRequest.description: Request body for installing a module from the danwa-modules repo.

InteractionResponse.title: InteractionResponse
InteractionResponse.description: A single interaction record returned by the API.

source.title: Source
source.description: Origin of the interjection (user, system, api)

InterjectRequest.title: InterjectRequest
InterjectRequest.description: Request body for submitting an interjection.

InterjectionPoint.title: InterjectionPoint
InterjectionPoint.description: A node that accepts external input during workflow execution.

InterruptInfo.title: InterruptInfo
InterruptInfo.description: Information about an active interrupt (agent waiting for user).

file_path.title: File Path
file_path.description: Specific file to invalidate (None = all files)

target_language.title: Target Language
target_language.description: Specific language to invalidate (None = all languages)

InvalidateTranslationRequest.title: InvalidateTranslationRequest
InvalidateTranslationRequest.description: Request body for invalidating cached translations.

LLMProfile.title: LLMProfile
LLMProfile.description: Configuration for a specific LLM endpoint.

LanguagePackExportRequest.title: LanguagePackExportRequest
LanguagePackExportRequest.description: Request to export UI translations as a Language Pack ZIP.

workflow_id.title: Workflow Id
workflow_id.description: WorkflowDefinition ID to execute. If omitted, uses workflow_template_id or first available active workflow.

workflow_template_id.title: Workflow Template Id
workflow_template_id.description: WorkflowTemplate ID to instantiate into a WorkflowDefinition. Ignored if workflow_id is provided.

language.title: Language
language.description: Language code (uses user preference if not set)

document_ids.title: Document Ids
document_ids.description: Document IDs to include as RAG context (explicit selection).

rag_auto_retrieve.title: Rag Auto Retrieve
rag_auto_retrieve.description: Automatically retrieve relevant chunks for the topic from project documents.

include_debate_results.title: Include Debate Results
include_debate_results.description: Include previous completed debate results in RAG context.

debate_result_ids.title: Debate Result Ids
debate_result_ids.description: Specific debate result IDs to include (if include_debate_results is True).

include_document_analysis.title: Include Document Analysis
include_document_analysis.description: Include LLM-generated document analysis in RAG context.

LaunchWorkflowRequest.title: LaunchWorkflowRequest
LaunchWorkflowRequest.description: Request body for launching a workflow from a completed input job.

LaunchWorkflowResponse.title: LaunchWorkflowResponse
LaunchWorkflowResponse.description: Response after launching a workflow from input.

project_id.title: Project Id
project_id.description: Target project ID to move the debate to

MoveDebateBody.title: MoveDebateBody
MoveDebateBody.description: Request body for moving a debate to another project.

OOBInputResponse.title: OOBInputResponse
OOBInputResponse.description: Response after submitting an OOB input.

OOBTarget.title: OOBTarget
OOBTarget.description: Routing target for an OOB input.

OOBTargetType.title: OOBTargetType
OOBTargetType.description: Target type for OOB input routing.

OcrSettingsBody.title: OcrSettingsBody
OcrSettingsBody.description:
Request body for OCR settings update.

Only `ocr_preferred_engine` is user-configurable via the UI.

OnboardingState.title: OnboardingState
OnboardingState.description:
The three booleans the Welcome-Card consumes.

- ``has_cases``    → at least one Case in the tenant
- ``has_documents`` → (reserved) at least one document in the
                      tenant; in the current architecture
                      documents are scoped per project, so
                      this stays False (the welcome card uses
                      it to decide whether to show the upload
                      hint, but the upload flow itself works
                      regardless)
- ``has_debates``   → at least one Debate in any case

action.description: 'pause' to pause the debate, 'resume' to continue

PauseRequest.title: PauseRequest
PauseRequest.description: POST /debate/{id}/pause — pause or resume a running debate.

PhaseConfig.title: PhaseConfig
PhaseConfig.description:
Configuration for a single debate phase.

Maps a ``wf-phase`` node ID to its runtime configuration:
phase name, description, assigned roles, max rounds, and header color.

config_schema.title: Config Schema
config_schema.description: JSON Schema for the plugin's config, usable for dynamic form generation

PluginInfo.description: Information about a registered output plugin.

PreviewRequest.description: Request body for preview — same fields as Composition.

ProposalResponse.description: Response model for an optimization proposal.

RenderJobStatusResponse.title: RenderJobStatusResponse
RenderJobStatusResponse.description: Response for render job status query.

ReportStatusResponse.title: ReportStatusResponse
ReportStatusResponse.description: Response for report job status query.

ResolvedAgent.title: ResolvedAgent
ResolvedAgent.description: A resolved agent reference from a WorkflowDefinition.

ResolvedBundle.title: ResolvedBundle
ResolvedBundle.description:
An AgentBundle with all referenced entities resolved and inline.

Produced by the BundleResolver for use in Workflow execution.
Contains the fully assembled system prompt.

interrupt_id.title: Interrupt Id
interrupt_id.description: ID of the interrupt (agent query) being answered

response.title: Response
response.description: User's response to the agent's question

RespondRequest.title: RespondRequest
RespondRequest.description: POST /debate/{id}/respond — user responds to an agent query.

RespondResponse.title: RespondResponse
RespondResponse.description: Response after answering an agent query.

RoleType.title: RoleType
RoleType.description:
A configurable role type/category (e.g. strategist, critic, optimizer, moderator).

Role types are first-class canvas entities that can be created, edited,
and connected to Role Definitions and Agent Blueprints. They define the
behavioral category and visual identity of a role.

RoundData.description: Data for a single debate round.

SearchMode.title: SearchMode
SearchMode.description: Web search mode for a debate.

bundle_ids.title: Bundle Ids
bundle_ids.description: AgentBundle IDs to use (overrides layout agent nodes)

language.title: Language
language.description: Language code (uses user preference if not set)

StartFromLayoutBody.title: StartFromLayoutBody
StartFromLayoutBody.description: Request body for starting a debate from a canvas layout.

language.title: Language
language.description: Language code (uses user preference if not set)

llm_profile_ids.description: Mapping of role → llm_profile_id for per-agent LLM assignment

agent_core_ids.title: Agent Core Ids
agent_core_ids.description: [Phase 2] Mapping of role → agent-core module ID. Composed with other components via ComposerService.

argumentation_pattern_ids.title: Argumentation Pattern Ids
argumentation_pattern_ids.description: [Phase 2] Mapping of role → argumentation-pattern module ID.

tone_profile_ids.title: Tone Profile Ids

prompt_modifier_ids.title: Prompt Modifier Ids
prompt_modifier_ids.description: [Phase 2] Mapping of role → prompt-modifier module ID.

document_ids.title: Document Ids
document_ids.description: DMS document IDs to include as RAG context

rag_auto_retrieve.title: Rag Auto Retrieve
rag_auto_retrieve.description: Automatically retrieve relevant document chunks based on context

include_debate_results.title: Include Debate Results
include_debate_results.description: Include results from previous completed debates as RAG context

include_document_analysis.title: Include Document Analysis
include_document_analysis.description: Include AI-generated document analysis in RAG context (may contain data from other cases in the same project)

debate_result_ids.title: Debate Result Ids
debate_result_ids.description: Specific debate IDs to include when include_debate_results is true. If empty, auto-selects up to 5 recent completed debates.

enable_extra_rounds.title: Enable Extra Rounds
enable_extra_rounds.description: If true, allow requesting additional rounds when consensus is not reached

StartMvpDebateRequest.description: Request body for starting an MVP debate with per-agent LLM profiles.

llm_assignments.title: Llm Assignments
llm_assignments.description: Mapping of role → llm_profile_id actually used

StartMvpDebateResponse.title: StartMvpDebateResponse
StartMvpDebateResponse.description: Response after starting an MVP debate.

language.title: Language
language.description: Language code (uses user preference if not set)

document_ids.title: Document Ids
document_ids.description: DMS document IDs to include as RAG context

rag_auto_retrieve.title: Rag Auto Retrieve
rag_auto_retrieve.description: Automatically retrieve relevant document chunks based on context

include_document_analysis.title: Include Document Analysis
include_document_analysis.description: Include AI-generated document analysis in RAG context (may leak data from other cases in the same project)

StartWorkflowRequest.title: StartWorkflowRequest
StartWorkflowRequest.description: Request body for starting a workflow.

plugin_key.title: Plugin Key
plugin_key.description: Key of the input plugin to use

ids.title: Ids
ids.description: Specific profile IDs to sync (None = all)

TagInfo.title: TagInfo
TagInfo.description: Compact tag representation for embedding in list responses.

TemplatePlaceholder.title: TemplatePlaceholder
TemplatePlaceholder.description:
Defines a single placeholder within a WorkflowTemplate.

Placeholders are replaced with concrete values during instantiation.

TenantCreate.title: TenantCreate
TenantCreate.description: Request model for creating a tenant.

TenantUpdate.title: TenantUpdate
TenantUpdate.description: Request model for updating tenant settings.

TerminationCondition.title: TerminationCondition
TerminationCondition.description:
A condition that determines when a workflow should stop.

Examples:
- ``max_rounds``: stop after N rounds
- ``consensus_reached``: stop when consensus threshold is met
- ``time_limit``: stop after N seconds

TokenResponse.title: TokenResponse
TokenResponse.description: JWT token pair returned on login.

ToneProfile.title: ToneProfile
ToneProfile.description:
Debate tone/style configuration for agent nodes.

Defines how an agent should communicate: formal vs. casual,
heated vs. neutral, verbose vs. concise, etc.

skip_back_translation.title: Skip Back Translation
skip_back_translation.description: Skip back-translation QA (faster but lower quality)

UpdateBundleRequest.title: UpdateBundleRequest
UpdateBundleRequest.description: Request body for updating a composer bundle.

UserCreate.title: UserCreate
UserCreate.description: Request model for creating a user.

UserKeyResponse.title: UserKeyResponse
UserKeyResponse.description: Response for a stored BYOK key (key is masked).

UserKeySetRequest.title: UserKeySetRequest
UserKeySetRequest.description: Request to store a BYOK API key.

WipeLocaleRequest.title: WipeLocaleRequest
WipeLocaleRequest.description: Request to wipe all translations for a locale.

phase_configs.title: Phase Configs
phase_configs.description: Phase configurations keyed by phase node ID. Each entry defines the name, assigned roles, max rounds, and color for a debate phase.

input_config.title: Input Config
input_config.description: Input Composer configuration for this workflow. Keys: default_input_plugin, stt_profile_id, a2a_inbound_enabled

WorkflowDefinition.title: WorkflowDefinition
WorkflowDefinition.description:
Defines a complete debate workflow.

References AgentBlueprints from the catalog by ID.
Does NOT duplicate blueprint data.

The ``nodes`` and ``edges`` fields provide the structured graph
representation.  ``phase_configs`` maps phase node IDs to their
runtime configuration (name, roles, max rounds).

``execution_order``, ``conditional_edges``, and
``interjection_points`` are retained for backward compatibility with
the list-based representation.

WorkflowEdge.title: WorkflowEdge
WorkflowEdge.description:
An edge connecting two workflow nodes.

Edge types:
- ``sequential``: unconditional forward connection
- ``conditional``: branching based on a condition expression
- ``interjection``: connects to an interjection point
- ``feedback``: loop-back edge (e.g. moderator → strategist for another round)
- ``injects_config``: config injection from tone_profile node to agent node

WorkflowNode.title: WorkflowNode
WorkflowNode.description:
A single node in a workflow graph.

Each node has a type that determines its behavior during execution.
Agent-type nodes (strategist, critic, optimizer, moderator) must
reference an AgentBlueprint via ``agent_blueprint_id``.
The generic ``wf-agent`` type references an ``AgentBundle`` via
``bundle_id`` instead.
Tone-profile nodes reference a ToneProfile from the catalog or
define an inline profile.

WorkflowTemplate.title: WorkflowTemplate
WorkflowTemplate.description:
A reusable workflow template with placeholder substitution.

Templates contain a ``template_data`` dictionary that mirrors the
structure of a ``WorkflowDefinition`` (nodes, edges, entry_point,
termination_conditions) but may contain ``{{key}}`` placeholders in
string fields.

During instantiation, all placeholders are replaced with concrete
values provided by the user, and the result is validated as a
``WorkflowDefinition``.

WorkspaceRecentEvent.title: WorkspaceRecentEvent
WorkspaceRecentEvent.description:
A condensed activity event for the Workspace's Recent Activity card.

Derived from the audit trail.  Only the fields relevant to a one-line
workspace summary are exposed — full audit events remain available via
the dedicated audit endpoint.

WorkspaceSuggestedNextStep.title: WorkspaceSuggestedNextStep
WorkspaceSuggestedNextStep.description:
A contextual hint surfaced on the Workspace's Suggested Next Steps card.

Example kinds:
- "unlinked_documents"  → user has docs in the DMS without a case
- "untagged_debates"    → at least one debate has zero tags
- "inactive_audit"      → no audit event for the case in N days

WorkspaceSummary.title: WorkspaceSummary
WorkspaceSummary.description:
Aggregated, case-scoped summary payload served by GET /api/workspace/summary.

The endpoint returns this in a single call to avoid N+1 round-trips from
the frontend when the workspace view mounts.

backend__models__user__ProfileUpdateRequ.title: ProfileUpdateRequest
backend__models__user__ProfileUpdateRequ.description: Request model for self-service profile update (PUT /me).
